title: palicourea urbaniana
intro: Palicourea urbaniana, also known as Urban's palicourea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and acting as a natural antioxidant. In traditional herbal medicine, Palicourea urbaniana is often prepared by boiling the leaves in water to make a tea, which can be used to treat various ailments.
